title: Fix NULL dereferences on OOM in module init and static string init
author: devdanzin
body:
Fixes #353 (part of #348).

## Changes

1. **`moduleinit`**: Add `if (m == NULL) return NULL;` after `PyModule_Create`.
2. **`_encoded_const`**: Add NULL checks after each `JSON_InternFromString` for `s_null`, `s_true`, `s_false`.
3. **`encoder_listencode_dict`/`list`**: Check each `JSON_InternFromString` individually to prevent partial init leaving NULL statics for subsequent calls.

All three are OOM-only paths, but they cause hard crashes (NULL dereference) instead of raising `MemoryError`.

Found using [cext-review-toolkit](https://github.com/devdanzin/cext-review-toolkit).
